summary: P4.2 Sync Job Stability - All features PASSED. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All stability dashboard components working correctly including stability KPIs, circuit breaker status, region sync panels with retry buttons.

issues: Redis shows 'unavailable' status - expected since Redis is not configured in preview env (MongoDB fallback working)

critical_code_review_comments: sync_stability_service.py: Well-implemented partial failure handling, exponential backoff retry logic, circuit breaker integration
inventory_sync_service.py: Good duplicate sync prevention via ACTIVE status check, stuck job detection working
inventory_sync_router.py: All P4.2 endpoints properly implemented with admin role protection
InventorySyncDashboardPage.jsx: Complete stability dashboard with all data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all stability panels, KPIs, circuit breaker, region sync working)

seed_data_creation: None required - simulation mode generates test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4.2 Sync Job Stability complete. All endpoints working. Stability dashboard shows 96.77% success rate. Circuit breakers all 'closed'. Region sync panels show retry buttons for 'Never' synced regions. All suppliers in SIMULATION mode.

GET /api/inventory/sync/stability-report.details: Returns valid stability data: success_rate, job_breakdown (completed/partial_errors/failed/stuck/retry_scheduled), supplier_breakdown with circuit_state, retry_effectiveness

GET /api/inventory/sync/regions/ratehawk.details: Returns 5 regions (Antalya, Istanbul, Bodrum, Dubai, Belek) with hotel counts and sync status

GET /api/inventory/sync/downtime/ratehaw.details: Returns is_down=false, circuit_state=closed, circuit_details, consecutive_failures=0, recommendation

POST /api/inventory/sync/trigger.details: Creates job with P4.2 fields: records_total, records_succeeded, records_failed, region_results

POST /api/inventory/sync/retry-region/ra.details: Creates region_retry job for Antalya, returns job_id, region_name, status, records_updated

POST /api/inventory/sync/cancel/{job_id}.details: Returns error for invalid/nonexistent job_id as expected

POST /api/inventory/sync/execute-retries.details: Returns executed count and results array

Duplicate sync prevention.details: Second trigger during active sync returns already_running or completed status

features: Stability KPIs (Completed, Partial Errors, Failed, Retry Scheduled, Stuck)
Region Sync panels with Retry buttons

mocked_apis_list: All supplier APIs (RateHawk, Paximum, TBO, WWTatil) in SIMULATION mode
mocked_apis.note: No real external supplier API calls made. System returns simulated hotel/price/availability data.

p42_implementation_verified.partial_failure_handling: Verified - successful records preserved on partial sync failure
p42_implementation_verified.circuit_breaker: Verified - supplier_ratehawk, supplier_paximum, etc. breakers configured
p42_implementation_verified.duplicate_sync_prevention: Verified - checks ACTIVE status before allowing new sync
p42_implementation_verified.region_retry: Verified - retry_failed_region creates region_retry job type
